vocab.example: I purchased a large, sunburst-style mirror to act as a focal point in my otherwise minimalist living room.

vocab.meaning: cải thiện/làm đẹp bầu không khí
vocab.example: We decided to buy a series of small decorative mirrors to enhance the ambiance and reflect the candlelight during dinner parties.
I was captivated by a vintage mirror featuring intricate etched glass patterns along its border.

vocab.meaning: lớp phủ chống xỉn màu/ố mờ
vocab.example: When shopping for a bathroom mirror, I specifically looked for one with a tarnish-resistant coating to withstand the humidity.
Instead of a standing one, I opted for a sleek wall-mounted fixture to save floor space in my dressing area.

vocab.meaning: phản chiếu phong cảnh xung quanh
vocab.example: We placed a massive mirror in the sunroom to reflect the surrounding landscape, effectively bringing the outdoors in.

vocab.meaning: độ rõ nét cao (hình ảnh chân thực)
vocab.example: I invested in a professional makeup mirror because it offers high-definition clarity without any distortion.
I recently acquired a mirror with a unique geometric configuration that adds a modern touch to my bedroom.

vocab.meaning: mua lại/tìm lại được từ một buổi thanh lý tài sản
vocab.example: My favorite piece is a heavy oak mirror that I managed to reclaim from an estate sale in the countryside.
I'm looking for a mirror with a minimalist wooden trim to match the Scandinavian vibe of my home.
